title: Finance Manager
description:
Job Description:

Monthly:

*  Perform monthly closing according to proper accounting standards and controls.

*  Petty cash control and bank reconciliation.

* Prepare GST filing and ensure that GST is correctly accounted for.

* Reviewing collection and ensuring timely invoicing for all events.

* Manage operating cash flow and prepare cash flow forecast.

* Responsible for accounting and finance management reporting, ensuring compliance to Singapore Financial Reporting Standards and Charity Accounting Standards, GST regulations, internal controls and other relevant rules and regulations.

Quarterly, Annual or When Required:

* Prepare annual budgets, monitor and analyze the actual vs budget contract sum and costs incurred of individual events/projects.

* Prepare value added financial reporting, Financial Planning & Analysis.

*  Reviewing collection of membership fees/members' billings due and ensuring timely invoicing.

*  Review of audit schedules and prepare accounting schedule packages for auditors.

*  Liaise with external parties such as bankers and auditors.

*  Assist CEO in preparing Statement of Accounts for Sport Singapore grants, grant application, IRAS & ROS documentations.

*  Other ad-hoc duties and reports that may be assigned by Management.

Requirements:

*  Bachelor in Accountancy or equivalent.

*  Good knowledge in FRS/CAS and experience in accounting, audit and tax.

* Minimum 4 years of relevant work experience.

* Working experience in sport associations/IPC will be an added advantage.

* Proficient in MS Office applications and Xero.

*  Good team player with strong communication and interpersonal skills.

* Meticulous, analytical, independent and yet able to work in a team.

postedCompany.description:
Mission & Vision

A non-profit organization registered with the Institutions of a Public Character (IPC), the Singapore Golf Association (SGA) is the National Sport Association governing the game of golf in Singapore.

OUR MISSION

The Singapore Golf Association’s mission is to be a national governing body of golf that monitors golf development, to enhance golfing experience and promote mass participation by providing the fraternity with the support it requires.

OUR VISION

  • To develop and promote sportsmanship and character through golf.
  • To identify and nurture a greater depth of talent.
  • To become one of the leading golfing nations in Southeast Asia, in terms of wins and world rankings.
  • To be committed to promoting and developing the sport across all aspects of the golfing population.
postedCompany.name: Singapore Golf Association
